titleStmt.title: SII 20.125: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 125. (B.K. No. 86 of 1935-36.) KALKĒRI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Hero-stone set up near the Sōmēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 3, Viśvāvasu, Mārgaśira, śu 8, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1185, December 2.
The inscription records the death of Boppaṇa, a servant of Chaladaṅkarāma Mādiseṭṭi during the cattle-raid of Kalukere by Tailahadēva of Dēvaṁgēri. Cf. No. 124 above and No. 126 below.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© jitēna labhyatē lakṣmī mritēnāpi surāṁganā kṣaṇavidhvaṁsini kāyē kā cintā maraṇē raṇē ©
svasti śrīmaccāḷukyacakravartti tribhuvanamallaṁ sōmēśvaradēvavarisada 3 neya visvāvasu saṁvatsarada mārggasira
su 8 mi sōmavāradaṁdu dēvaṁgēriya tailahadēvaṁ śrīmaccaladaṁkarāma maṁneya jūju mādiseṭṭiya
kalukeṟeya tuṟuvaṁ koḷvalliye raṇadoḷu . tandeyu maganuṁ raṇadoḷu saṁdubhaya balagaḷeraḍu meThe letters ṇadoḷu are engraved below the section.
ccalu niṁdiṟidu hoṁdidāgaḷe suraduṁdubhi Eseyaluke dēvakāṁnteyaruyi daru . ©The letter yi is engraved below the line.

© parabaḷamaniṟidu geluduṁ poredāḷdaṁ mecce kādi raṇadoḷu maḍiduṁ suravani teyaroḷu
neredaṁ dhareyoḷu boppaṇane vīradāgaramāda . va . Antātana kāḷeya birudenteṁdaḍe
Āḷiṁ muṁniṟivaṁ sitagara gaṁḍaṁ tegebīya caladaṁkarāmana gaṁdhavāraṇaṁ malevara māri koṁ
ḍeyara gaṁḍanenisi svāmi saṁtōsaṁ baḍedu niṟisida vīrasāsana bhadraṁ subhaṁ maṁgaḷa © śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.125 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
